cases.question: Assemble the validated capability artifacts into the final sourced investment report with explicit gaps and disclosures.
Create an IC memo from frozen research artifacts, including the thesis, independent bear case, catalysts, risks, unknowns, and source ledger.
Calculate a scenario DCF, EV-to-equity bridge, and sensitivity grid from the forecast inputs.
Audit unresolved claims for source identity, freshness, quality, accessibility, and conflict status.
